purpose: Defines runtime alert levels, routing decisions, and operator-review requirements for finance drift monitoring.

info.description: Low-risk runtime event captured for observation.

watch.description: Early warning trend detected; continue monitoring.

warning.description: Material degradation or recurrence detected; route to relevant layer.

critical.description: High-risk compliance, source, calculation, evidence, or safety issue detected.

operator_review.description: Operator intervention required before the system should treat the issue as resolved.

routeDescriptions.route_to_operator_review: Escalate to the operator for manual review.
routeDescriptions.route_to_layer14_compliance_review: Send issue back to compliance and disclosure governance.
routeDescriptions.route_to_layer02_source_freshness_review: Send issue back to source authority and freshness validation.
routeDescriptions.route_to_layer06_execution_recalculation: Send issue back to calculation, ratio, scenario, or valuation execution.
routeDescriptions.route_to_layer07_evidence_binding_review: Send issue back to evidence binding and claim support validation.
routeDescriptions.route_to_layer03_ingestion_gap_review: Send issue back to input extraction and missing-context resolution.
routeDescriptions.monitor_only: No immediate route required; continue monitoring.
